description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The structure has a prominent two-story central section with a gabled roof, flanked by single-story wings and a covered porch area. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and views of the outdoor spaces. The property includes a swimming pool, paved patio, and multiple outdoor seating areas, all enclosed by a perimeter fence and mature trees. The rooflines are varied, with both gable and shed elements, and the overall design emphasizes open, connected indoor-outdoor living. The landscaping is carefully manicured, enhancing the contemporary and inviting appearance of the residence.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with mixed rooflines, large windows, a pool, and lush landscaping, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance, covered porch, large windows, and the pool area with surrounding trees and patio.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tall central section, vertical window arrangements, and the privacy provided by dense trees and fencing.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the extended single-story wing, additional windows, and the full perimeter of trees and fencing.
description_view_3: The angled view emphasizes the pool, patio, and the integration of the house with its landscaped surroundings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
